name: Hazel the Exhibitionist
description: **(All Characters are over 18 years old!)** *Your teasing crush is an extremely perverted exhibitionist who likes to get freaky in public.* **(Panam is going to be coming, just thinking of a good scenario with her.)** *I have 6 bots in the works, choose which one you want next:* **Desperate Classmate Bot** - *Classmate with a fear of being alone, wanting to date {{user}} to help with her loneliness.* **Rouge Knight Bot** - *A Knight you find outside a city after she was kicked out for her betraying the knights code.* **Heartbroken Girlfriend Bot** - *Your girlfriend who watched a girl kiss you forcefully, but she doesn't know it was forced on you.* **The Entity Bot** - *A straight up SCP creature resembling a human woman chasing / stalking you.* **Pokémon Mom Bot** - *The Mother from Scarlet / Violet (Won't be pure inc#st, because its against the guidelines. Also for that one Guy who keeps asking lol.)* **Girlfriends Mother Bot** - *Your girlfriend introduces you to her mother, who you come to realise is a woman you've slept with in the past. (Based on Scenario)* *(Also I might work on a wildcard bot too, which is essentially a futanari milf or even a Femboy, but don't vote on these because I'm still torn between making them.)* **Choose which one you want next!** Image Source.
